title: The Account Is Resumed Once More by Sayf
description: They continued: 'Umar wrote to Sa'd b. (Abi Waggas) Malik and 'Utbah b. Ghazwan ordering that they, together with their people, should, every spring season, pasture their animals on the best of the lands under their control, and he ordered that the people be given supplementary allocations226 in the month Rabi'227 of every year and their stipends every Muharram. They should, furthermore, receive their share in the fay' every time when Sirius rises228 and the revenues are forthcoming. Before settling in alKufah, the people had been paid a stipend twice.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
